expectations.evidence: # Prism Plan Skill Evaluation: Real-Time Test Results Dashboard Screen

expectations.text: Success criteria are split into Automated Verification and Manual Verification sections
Each phase includes specific file paths and verification commands
expectations.evidence: - The CLI uses a **plugin architecture** where each screen implements the `plugin.Plugin` interface

expectations.text: A 'What We Are NOT Doing' scope section is included
Risks and mitigations section is present
TodoWrite is used to track phases
